title: Halocnemum caspicum
taxonomy: Halocnemum caspicum is classified as a species of succulent plant in the family Chenopodiaceae, which is now often included in the family Amaranthaceae. This classification places it within the order Caryophyllales. The family Amaranthaceae is a large group of flowering plants that includes many species of succulents and other plants. Halocnemum caspicum is a type of succulent that is adapted to life in saline environments, such as salt marshes and coastal areas. Its classification reflects its unique adaptations and its relationship to other succulent and flowering plants.
